description: Added a rule to ensure coverage of significant raw metrics from the digest, beyond just derived KPIs, to improve completeness.

Improved causal depth and data specificity in the default 'Key Findings' content when no significant changes are detected, using more precise terminology and hinting at underlying reasons for stability.
Upgraded report_synthesis_agent to 'pro' for higher quality reasoning in final report generation, aiming to improve causal depth and narrative coherence.
Enhanced actionability in the insights report by explicitly requiring a clear, actionable recommendation for each insight.
Upgrading report_synthesis_agent to 'pro' for higher quality reasoning in final report generation, aiming to improve causal depth and narrative coherence.
Enhanced actionability for 'now_what' by explicitly requesting concrete next steps or further investigations based on the statistical finding.
Upgraded project_manager_agent to 'advanced' for deeper analysis and more actionable recommendations, aiming to improve causal depth and actionability.
Enhanced narrative coherence by guiding the introduction to Key Findings to summarize overarching trends before diving into specific insights.

Clarified the required analytical depth for 'what_moved' items, ensuring they provide causal links, implications, or consequences instead of vague context, to enhance causal depth and narrative coherence.
Upgrade project_manager_agent to 'advanced' for deeper analysis and more actionable recommendations, leveraging insights from previous successful experiments on causal depth and actionability.
